meaning: vt.再访,重游,重临n.第二次访问
examples: The committee agreed to revisit the issue at their next meeting.
It has become so popular that whenever disasters happen, people revisit the song and find strength in it.
People can revisit and refocus an image, days, months, even years later.
You get the opportunity to revisit this decision every year until you are dead.
With the passage of time comes a reluctance to revisit things that have already passed.
